requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline — SAZ-Conformity and Project Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线——SAZ符合性及项目证据
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線——SAZ符合性及項目證據

summary.en: SAZ is Zimbabwe's national standards body, and Zimbabwe projects commonly look to IEC-aligned standards for electrical equipment where local standards adopt or reference IEC requirements. For EV supply equipment, the relevant international safety baseline is IEC 61851-1 for conductive EV charging systems and IEC 61851-23 for DC EV supply equipment. Evidence should cover control pilot behaviour, protective earthing, isolation monitoring, interlocks, overcurrent and over-temperature protection, emergency stop where applicable, enclosure IP rating, installation instructions, and Zimbabwe site conditions.
summary.zh: SAZ是津巴布韦国家标准机构，津巴布韦项目在当地标准采纳或引用IEC要求时，通常参照IEC体系电气设备标准。对于电动汽车供电设备，相关国际安全基线为IEC 61851-1传导式充电系统和IEC 61851-23直流电动汽车供电设备。证据应覆盖控制导引、保护接地、绝缘监测、互锁、过流及过温保护、适用时的急停、外壳IP防护等级、安装说明和津巴布韦现场条件。
summary.zht: SAZ是辛巴威國家標準機構，辛巴威項目在當地標準採納或引用IEC要求時，通常參照IEC體系電氣設備標準。對於電動汽車供電設備，相關國際安全基線為IEC 61851-1傳導式充電系統和IEC 61851-23直流電動汽車供電設備。證據應覆蓋控制導引、保護接地、絕緣監測、互鎖、過流及過溫保護、適用時的急停、外殼IP防護等級、安裝說明和辛巴威現場條件。

standards_or_laws: Standards Association of Zimbabwe (SAZ) standards and conformity-assessment route, where applicable
IEC 61851-1 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code)

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023, which corresponds structurally to IEC 61851-1 but includes China-specific connector, signaling, and communication requirements. GB/T 18487.1-2023 test evidence is useful as a design starting point but does not by itself prove IEC 61851 conformity or SAZ acceptance for a Zimbabwe project.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023，其结构上对应IEC 61851-1，但包含中国特有的接口、信号及通信要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023测试证据可作为设计起点参考，但其本身不能证明IEC 61851符合性或津巴布韦项目的SAZ接受。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023，其結構上對應IEC 61851-1，但包含中國特有的接口、信號及通訊要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023測試證據可作為設計起點參考，但其本身不能證明IEC 61851符合性或辛巴威項目的SAZ接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: Exporters should prepare an IEC 61851-1 clause matrix, accredited IEC safety test reports, DC-station IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC products, IP-rating certificates, protective device ratings, installation instructions, and a Zimbabwe site-risk review that covers voltage, earthing, heat, rain, dust, vandalism exposure, and load-shedding operation. A standalone GB/T 18487 report is not enough without IEC clause mapping and project acceptance.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵、认可的IEC安全测试报告、直流产品的IEC 61851-23证据、IP防护等级证书、保护器件额定值、安装说明，以及覆盖电压、接地、热、雨水、粉尘、破坏暴露和限电运行的津巴布韦现场风险审查。单独的GB/T 18487报告在没有IEC逐条映射和项目接受的情况下并不足够。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣、認可的IEC安全測試報告、直流產品的IEC 61851-23證據、IP防護等級證書、保護器件額定值、安裝說明，以及覆蓋電壓、接地、熱、雨水、粉塵、破壞暴露和限電運行的辛巴威現場風險審查。單獨的GB/T 18487報告在沒有IEC逐條映射和項目接受的情況下並不足夠。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional to mandatory — required where SAZ conformity, ZERA / ZETDC project conditions, tender documents, insurers, site owners, or installers require IEC-family EVSE safety evidence; confirm exact route and adopted standard edition before shipment
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and certification; it is not accepted as direct IEC 61851 evidence without additional assessment

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487.1-2023 as a design starting point only. Zimbabwe-facing EVSE documentation should include IEC 61851-1 evidence, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC stations, IP-rated enclosure certificates, and a site review that accounts for Zimbabwe grid and load-shedding conditions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487.1-2023作为设计起点。面向津巴布韦的EVSE文件应包括IEC 61851-1证据、直流充电站IEC 61851-23证据、IP防护等级证书，以及考虑津巴布韦电网和限电条件的现场审查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487.1-2023作為設計起點。面向辛巴威的EVSE文件應包括IEC 61851-1證據、直流充電站IEC 61851-23證據、IP防護等級證書，以及考慮辛巴威電網和限電條件的現場審查。
